prompts.text: Extreme 3D CGI caricature of [character]—extremely exaggerated proportions and oversized features for maximum comic effect. A head-and-shoulders portrait, incredibly stylized with bold, dramatic expressions. Ultra-smooth matte materials. Character perspective. A saturated background creating strong visual contrast. Soft lighting and ambient shadows for depth.
